case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. JUAN CARLOS NAVARRO CAUICH

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,277.92 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CAUICH, JUAN CARLOS NAVARRO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-14-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-14-2019 - JUDGMENT.
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 6/25/19. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - UNCLAIMED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CAUICH, JUAN CARLOS NAVARRO $2,277.92 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,377.92 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 50.00 - SERVED APR-18-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CAUICH, JUAN CARLOS NAVARRO
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-14-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-14-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY LUPE ACEDEVO. DEFENDANT JUAN CARLOS NAVARRO CAUICH IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
